description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat and low-pitched roof design, featuring a combination of white, gray, and brown exterior surfaces. The structure is organized around a central courtyard with landscaped green areas and several distinct wings, likely for different living functions. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The property is enclosed by perimeter walls, with a prominent main entryway flanked by a driveway and a covered carport. The landscaping includes palm trees and manicured lawns, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a focus on privacy, outdoor living, and open-plan interiors.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a central courtyard, surrounded by landscaped lawns and perimeter walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, carport, and the central courtyard with landscaped areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat rooflines, rear garden, and the arrangement of the house wings around the courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional green spaces, and the back facades of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, carport, and the alignment of palm trees along the entry path.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, covered porch, flanking columns, and a landscaped approach with palm trees.
